themes.reasoning_notes: Instant used in combat to alter blocking unexpectedly; mainly a niche defensive trick that can ambush even 'unblockable' attackers.
It replaces itself on the next upkeep, so card draw is present but clearly secondary to the combat effect.
Only cast in declare blockers step; it functions as a very narrow defensive combat trick by forcing an unblocked attacker to become blocked.
It replaces itself at the next upkeep, but the delayed cantrip is incidental to the card's highly specific combat use.
